info.name: Henloworld Bank API
info.description:
LEARNING STEP 7: Import this into Postman and fill in requests.

Tasks:
1. Set collection variable baseUrl = http://localhost:8080
2. Add requests for POST /accounts, GET /accounts/:id/balance, POST deposit, POST withdraw
3. After Step 8: add POST /auth/login and set Bearer token on account requests
4. Optional: chain create -> deposit -> balance using saved id variable
